forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 22 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 24 to 29.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north in the early morning. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely this afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Keith, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the north, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning southerly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Becoming cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Hawker, medium chance elsewhere. A thunderstorm likely, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 29 to 34.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the morning and early afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding east of Ceduna in the late morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 33.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 31.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the early morning. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during this afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm during this afternoon and evening. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy. Thunderstorms possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding south of Woomera in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the early morning. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 34.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek. Thunderstorms possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding south of Yunta in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning then tending southerly 30 to 45 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 38.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
